# UC-17.6.1 · Akamai Guardicore Microsegmentation Policy Violation Alerts (`guardicore:network`)

## Description

Violations show east-west traffic that should not exist; they are often the first sign of lateral movement.

## Value

Containment rules can auto-trigger when paired with SOAR.

## Implementation

Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

## SPL

```spl
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:network" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(action),"(?i)violation|alert|warn")
| stats count by policy_name, src_asset, dst_asset
| sort -count
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Change.Change
  by Change.user, Change.object, Change.action span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Table (assets, policy), timeline.

## References

- [Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7426)
- [Akamai Guardicore documentation](https://www.akamai.com/products/guardicore)
